title: Senior Product Manager
description: Lead product roadmap execution for a cross-functional platform team. Partner with engineering leadership, define priorities, and drive measurable outcomes. Requires leadership, stakeholder management, and system architecture awareness.

title: Staff Software Engineer
description: Design distributed systems for mission-critical APIs. Mentor engineers, improve incident response, and own architecture decisions. Requires TypeScript, cloud infrastructure, and operational excellence.

title: Principal Data Scientist
description: Lead experimentation strategy and statistical modeling for core fintech products. Collaborate with executives, communicate model tradeoffs, and define analytics standards.

title: Engineering Manager
description: Manage a multi-disciplinary team delivering robotics software. Hire and mentor engineers, track KPIs, and align roadmaps with business targets. Requires leadership, budgeting, and communication.

title: Security Architect
description: Own enterprise security architecture and compliance strategy. Drive risk assessments, incident readiness, and security patterns across product teams. Requires cloud security and stakeholder influence.
